analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与超基性岩石的“受激地质氢”产生直接相关，但由于实验规模较小、在1个大气压下且以未定标的浓度传感响应为主，该结果对现场尺度地球物理意义仍属于较弱关联、需进一步升压定量验证。

paper.title: Climate Change Perceptions and Policy Priorities in Pakistan: A Community Survey Analysis and Stratospheric Aerosol Injection Perspective
paper.abstract: Climate change constitutes a compound existential risk for Pakistan — a nation responsible for less than one percent of global greenhouse-gas emissions yet consistently ranked among the ten most climate-vulnerable states on earth (Germanwatch, 2021). Escalating heatwaves, intensifying monsoon floods, accelerating glacial retreat, chronic smog, and advancing desertification are not future projections for Pakistan: they are present, documented, and accumulating realities that claim lives, destroy crops, and destabilise livelihoods year after year. To assess community-level perceptions, lived impacts, and policy priorities, the PIEAS SAI Research Initiative administered a bilingual (English / Roman Urdu) structured survey instrument from 1 to 16 May 2026. A total of 1,149 valid, anonymised responses were obtained across all seven administrative regions: Punjab (37.5%), Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (25.8%), Islamabad Capital Territory (21.1%), Sindh (7.0%), Azad Jammu and Kashmir (3.5%), Gilgit-Baltistan (2.3%), and Balochistan (2.7%). The sample comprised 852 general-public respondents and 297 domain professionals from engineering, natural sciences, and academia. Principal findings indicate that 90.6% of general-public respondents rated their climate-change awareness as Critical or Serious. Disruption to rainfall patterns ranked highest among six impact dimensions on a five-point Likert scale (mean = 3.91; SD = 1.1), followed by extreme heat-wave intensity (mean = 3.76; SD = 1.1) and agricultural stress (mean = 3.70; SD = 1.1). An aggregate 68.8% reported direct household or livelihood damage attributable to climate events. Afforestation and ecosystem restoration dominated government-priority preferences (65.1%), with water-resource management second (20.9%). This report documents the full survey findings, integrates triangulated secondary evidence for underrepresented regions, develops a thematic qualitative analysis, critically evaluates the limitations of community-preferred conventional solutions, and situates the survey evidence within the PIEAS SAI Research Initiative's broader scientific inquiry into Stratospheric Aerosol Injection (SAI) as a near-term, temporary geoengineering supplement — not replacement — to conventional emissions-reduction pathways
categories: Solar Geoengineering Climate Policy Climate Perception Community Survey Climate Adaptation Climate Governance Geoengineering PIEAS

analysis.one_sentence_en: A PIEAS community survey across Pakistan (N=1,149) finds very high climate-change awareness and identifies rainfall disruption as the top perceived impact, informing preference and feasibility discussions for stratospheric aerosol injection as a supplementary measure.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: PIEAS对巴基斯坦开展的社区调查(N=1,149)显示高水平气候变化认知，认为降雨格局紊乱影响最突出，并用于讨论平流层气溶胶注入作为补充干预的可行性。
summary_en: problem: Pakistan faces severe climate-vulnerability, but community-perceived impacts and policy priorities—especially regarding solar geoengineering supplements like SAI—are insufficiently documented.

approach: The PIEAS SAI Research Initiative ran a bilingual structured web survey (1–16 May 2026) with mixed-methods Likert and open-text items plus secondary-evidence triangulation for underrepresented regions.

key result: Most general-public respondents rated their climate awareness as Critical/Serious, and rainfall-pattern disruption ranked highest among perceived impacts; government-priority preferences favored afforestation/ecosystem restoration.
summary_zh: problem: 巴基斯坦气候风险很高，但在平流层气溶胶注入(SAI)等“补充型”太阳辐射地球工程议题上，社区对影响与政策优先级的认知与偏好证据不足。
approach: PIEAS在2026年5月1日至16日开展双语网络结构化问卷，结合Likert量表与开放文本，并对样本稀缺地区进行二手证据三角验证。
key result: 大多数公众将自身气候认知评为严重/关键，认为降雨格局紊乱是最主要的感知影响；政府优先项偏向造林与生态修复。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a nationwide, community-level characterization of perceived climate impacts, self-reported damages, and policy preferences in Pakistan, explicitly situating the evidence within a feasibility-oriented context for SAI as a non-replacement supplementary intervention.
analysis.contribution_zh: 给出了巴基斯坦社区层面的气候认知、感知影响、自报损失与政策偏好全貌，并将这些证据置于以可行性为导向的SAI讨论框架中，强调其作为补充而非替代减排路径。
analysis.method_en: Bilingual (English/Roman Urdu) web-hosted structured survey with separate general-public and professional modules, using Likert-scale impact ranking and open-text narratives, plus secondary-data triangulation for underrepresented regions.
analysis.method_zh: 通过双语(英文/罗马乌尔都语)线上结构化问卷开展研究，设置公众与专业人员模块，使用Likert量表进行影响排序并结合开放文本叙述；对样本稀缺地区引入二手数据进行三角验证。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Pakistan; bilingual web survey conducted 1–16 May 2026 across seven administrative regions (Punjab, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Islamabad Capital Territory, Sindh, Azad Jammu and Kashmir, Gilgit-Baltistan, Balochistan), N=1,149 with secondary evidence from agencies/literature for underrepresented regions.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 巴基斯坦；2026年5月1日至16日覆盖七个行政区域的双语线上问卷（旁遮普、开伯尔-普赫图赫瓦、伊斯兰堡首都辖区、信德、阿扎德查谟和克什米尔、吉尔吉特-巴尔蒂斯坦、俾路支斯坦），有效样本N=1,149；对样本稀缺地区补充机构与文献的二手证据。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Relevance is tangential: the paper is mainly climate-societal perception and governance research, but it includes an explicit SAI feasibility context that could inform geoengineering governance discussions rather than providing geophysical measurements or models.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 相关性较弱：论文主要是气候社会认知与治理研究，并非地球物理观测或模型；但其对SAI可行性与治理讨论提供了社会证据背景。

paper.title: Snow water equivalent estimates from airborne radar in the St. Elias Mountains
paper.abstract: Quantifying the input mass from snow accumulation on rapidly changing glaciers is critical to establishing baseline states and predicting responses to climate change. Some of the largest glaciers in the world are located in the St. Elias Mountains in Southeast Alaska and Southwest Yukon; however, the input mass to these glaciers is poorly constrained. Here we used airborne radar sounding combined with in situ measurements of snow properties, and satellite imagery from Landsat 8/9 and Sentinel 1, to estimate the winter mass balance on the Bering, Hubbard, Kaskawulsh, Logan, Seward, Walsh, and Yahtse glaciers. Along-track snow water equivalent measurements for the winter accumulation period range from 0 to 3 m in 2018, 0.2 to 3.4 m in 2021, and 1.1 to 3.3 m in 2023. On-glacier measurements from the Seward and Kaskawulsh glaciers provided a mean seasonal snow density of 438 ± 22 kg m-3 which leads to a real dielectric permittivity of 1.86 ± 0.12, similar to values from other Alaskan glaciers. We observed that the maritime glaciers Yahtse, Bering, Hubbard, and Seward receive significantly more accumulation than the more inland glaciers.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Using airborne radar sounding calibrated by snow density measurements and combined with Landsat and Sentinel imagery, the study estimates winter snow water equivalent and input mass for seven St. Elias Mountains glaciers in 2018, 2021, and 2023.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 研究结合机载雷达测冰/雪、现场雪密度标定以及Landsat与Sentinel影像，估算了2018、2021和2023年育康山脉7座冰川的冬季雪水当量与增冰输入质量。
summary_en: problem: Winter snow accumulation mass input to major St. Elias Mountains glaciers is poorly constrained, limiting baseline and climate-response assessments.

approach: The authors derive glacier-average winter SWE from airborne FMCW radar stratigraphy calibrated with in situ snow density, constrain accumulation to elevations above the equilibrium line, and aggregate within elevation bins using Landsat-derived snowline/ELA and Sentinel-1 melt context.

key result: Along-track SWE for winter accumulation spans 0–3 m (2018), 0.2–3.4 m (2021), and 1.1–3.3 m (2023), with inferred mean seasonal snow density 438 ± 22 kg m−3 (real permittivity 1.86 ± 0.12) and higher accumulation on maritime glaciers than more inland ones.
summary_zh: problem: 育康山脉多座大型冰川的冬季积雪增冰输入质量约束不足，影响基线状态与气候响应评估。
approach: 作者利用经现场雪密度标定的FMCW机载雷达反射层位反演冬季雪水当量（SWE），仅统计高于平衡线高程的积累，并结合Landsat确定积雪线/ELA、用Sentinel-1辅助理解融化对穿透与分层解释的影响后按高程分带汇总。
key result: 冬季沿航向SWE范围为2018年0–3 m、2021年0.2–3.4 m、2023年1.1–3.3 m；Seward与Kaskawulsh的季节平均雪密度为438 ± 22 kg m−3（对应实介电常数1.86 ± 0.12），且海洋性冰川的积累显著高于更内陆的冰川。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a multi-source workflow to convert airborne FMCW radar stratigraphy into glacier-average winter SWE and maximum input mass for multiple St. Elias Mountains glaciers, validated via crossovers and comparisons to surface GPR and snow cores, and characterizes maritime-to-inland accumulation contrasts.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一套将经雪密度标定的FMCW机载雷达分层结果转化为育康山脉多座冰川冬季雪水当量与最大输入质量的多源流程，并通过雷达轨迹交叉一致性以及与地表GPR/雪芯的对比进行验证，同时揭示海洋性到内陆的积累差异。
analysis.method_en: Airborne FMCW radar sounding (Operation IceBridge 2018/2021; separate 2023 Cessna 206 acquisition) interpreted with a radar analysis utility to pick the last summer snow surface; snow depth converted to SWE using in situ snow density to set radar wave speed/real permittivity; accumulation aggregated above Landsat-derived equilibrium line altitude using elevation bins/hypsometry from RGI; verification via radar crossover analysis, radar–surface GPR comparisons, and proximity comparisons to snow cores; Sentinel-1 reflectivity analyzed to assess melt effects on radar penetration and stratigraphy.
analysis.method_zh: 使用FMCW机载雷达探测（2018/2021来自NASA Operation IceBridge；2023为另一机型Cessna 206采集），结合开源雷达分析工具人工拾取“上一个夏季雪面”反射界面；通过现场雪密度估计雷达波速/实介电常数，将雪深换算为SWE；用Landsat反演的平衡线高程限制统计范围，并基于RGI高程分带与面积加权汇总高于ELA的积累；通过雷达交叉一致性、与地表耦合GPR的对比以及与邻近雪芯的对比进行验证；同时分析Sentinel-1反射率以评估融化对雷达穿透与分层解释的影响。
analysis.data_or_region_en: St. Elias Mountains, Southeast Alaska and Southwest Yukon: seven glaciers (Bering, Hubbard, Kaskawulsh, Logan, Seward, Walsh, Yahtse); airborne radar campaigns in 2018, 2021, and 2023 plus snow density/core sites on Seward (2018/2023) and Kaskawulsh (2018) and surface-coupled GPR on Seward (2023); Landsat 8/9 and Sentinel-1 for equilibrium line/snowline and melt context.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 育康山脉（美国阿拉斯加东南部与加拿大西南育空）：研究7座冰川（Bering、Hubbard、Kaskawulsh、Logan、Seward、Walsh、Yahtse）；机载雷达于2018、2021、2023年开展，并在Seward（2018/2023）与Kaskawulsh（2018）布设雪密度/取芯点；2023年在Seward采集地表耦合GPR；使用Landsat 8/9与Sentinel-1用于确定平衡线/积雪线并提供融化背景信息。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Strong relevance to glacier cryosphere mass-balance tracking because it delivers quantitative winter SWE and mass input estimates from radar sounding, a key step toward monitoring baseline states under climate change.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与当前追踪的冰川圈层/质量平衡监测高度相关，因为它把雷达探测转化为冬季SWE与质量输入的定量估计，是刻画气候变化下基线状态的重要步骤。

paper.title: Seasonality and Trends in Coastal Water Temperatures from NOAA Water Level Monitoring Stations along US Coasts
paper.abstract: Coastal regions are complex environments. They lie at the confluence of physical oceanic, atmospheric, and land-based processes, and continue to undergo significant change due to both natural and human-driven factors. Although it is well known that ocean sea surface temperatures (SSTs) have increased over the past several decades, extending these trends and patterns to coastal waters is nontrivial. We evaluated a new quality-controlled dataset of coastal water temperature collected at NOAA Center for Operational Oceanographic Products and Services (CO-OPS) water level monitoring stations. Water temperature (WT) records were analyzed at 95 stations extending from the mid-1990s to 2023 and representing all the major US coastal regions. Seasonal cycle metrics, linear trends, daily distributions, and extreme percentile thresholds were computed at each site. Seasonal cycles and peak times of year tracked well with solar heating and consistently tracked behind air temperature by a few days to a few weeks. US East Coast and Great Lakes regions have a much stronger seasonal cycle and larger range (up to 25℃) than West Coast and Island regions (as low as 3℃). The great majority of stations experience warming over this time period, with statistically significant trends at 56 of 95 stations, averaging approximately 0.5 ℃/decade. Many of these locations are also experiencing sea level rise, most notably in the Southeast and Gulf regions. Although geographic patterns exist, variations are found in extreme threshold temperatures and trends station to station and between bay systems and the open coast, highlighting the need for continuous in situ monitoring along the coast. This study provides baseline statistics of long-term near shore coastal WT data and supports informed future planning and decision-making in this dynamic environment.
categories: Oceanography and Atmospheric Sciences and Meteorology

analysis.one_sentence_en: The study builds a quality-controlled record of near-shore coastal water temperatures from 95 NOAA CO-OPS stations across US coasts and quantifies seasonality, extremes, and long-term warming trends through 2023.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该研究基于NOAA CO-OPS的95个沿美国海岸站点构建近岸海水温度质控数据集，并分析季节性、极端阈值与1990年代至2023年的长期变暖趋势。
summary_en: problem: Extending known open-ocean SST warming patterns to highly variable near-shore coastal waters is difficult due to sparse, station-level observations.

approach: Use a newly quality-controlled NOAA CO-OPS coastal water-temperature dataset from 95 monitoring stations to compute seasonal cycle metrics, daily distributions and percentile-based extremes, and station-specific linear trends, with additional comparisons to OISST and marine heatwave statistics.

key result: Most stations show warming from the mid-1990s to 2023, with statistically significant trends at 56/95 stations (~0.5 °C per decade on average), stronger seasonal cycles on the US East Coast and Great Lakes, and strong station-to-station variability in extreme thresholds.
summary_zh: problem: 将已知的海表温度增暖格局外推到高度受局地影响的近岸海水温度并不容易，因为相关长期原位观测不足。
approach: 利用NOAA CO-OPS新质控的近岸水温数据（95个站点）计算季节循环指标、基于日分布的极端分位阈值，以及各站的线性趋势，并结合与OISST及关键地区的海洋热浪频次评估进行补充。
key result: 1990年代中期至2023年间多数站点呈现增暖（56/95站点趋势显著，平均约0.5 ℃/十年）；东海岸与五大湖季节性更强，而极端阈值在站点与湾区/外海之间存在显著差异。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a baseline, quality-controlled long-term near-shore coastal water temperature dataset and station-wise statistics (seasonality, daily extremes, and trends) for planning and assessment of coastal thermal change and extremes.
analysis.contribution_zh: 构建并提供长期近岸海水温度的质控基线数据集，给出站点级季节性、日分布极端阈值与增温趋势统计，用于支持沿海热变化与极端事件的评估与规划。
analysis.method_en: Quality-controlled daily mean water temperature time series from NOAA CO-OPS stations are analyzed to compute daily/montly climatologies and seasonality lags via correlations with station air temperature, estimate daily extremes using KDE-based empirical distributions (90/95/99 percentiles), and derive station-specific long-term warming using linear trends on monthly anomalies with attention to serial correlation and seasonality (ARIMA-based handling).
analysis.method_zh: 基于NOAA CO-OPS站点的质控日均水温序列，先计算逐日/逐月气候态并与气温进行相关分析以确定相位滞后；再用核密度估计的经验分布估计日极端阈值（90/95/99分位）；最后在考虑序列相关与季节性的前提下，对月异常进行站点特异的线性增温趋势估计（采用ARIMA框架处理）。
analysis.data_or_region_en: NOAA CO-OPS water level monitoring stations along US coasts; 95 stations with daily mean water temperatures spanning at least ~20 years (mid-1990s to 2023), covering US East Coast, Gulf, West Coast, Great Lakes, Alaska, and islands.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 美国沿海NOAA CO-OPS水位监测站；95个站点的日均水温序列覆盖约20年以上（约1990年代中期至2023年），覆盖美国东海岸、墨西哥湾、南/西海岸、五大湖、阿拉斯加以及岛屿地区。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This matters for coastal hazard and marine-heatwave-related climate impacts because near-shore warming, seasonality shifts, and extreme-temperature thresholds control ecosystem stress and local risk, though the work is oceanographic rather than geophysical instrumentation per se.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这对沿海灾害与海洋热浪相关的气候影响很重要，因为近岸增温、季节变化以及极端温度阈值会驱动生态压力与局地风险；但其主要是海洋学层面的分析，偏地球物理相关性较间接。

paper.title: Neural Negative Binomial Regression for Weekly Seismicity Forecasting: Per-Cell Dispersion Estimation and Tail Risk Assessment
paper.abstract: Standard approaches to forecasting the weekly number of earthquakes on a spatial grid rely on the Poisson distribution with a single global dispersion assumption. We show that this assumption is systematically violated in seismic data from Central Asia (2010-2024), where a likelihood-ratio test with boundary correction strongly rejects the Poisson hypothesis (p < 10^{-179}). The main contribution of this work is the EarthquakeNet architecture, which provides an endogenous per-cell estimate of the overdispersion parameter alpha via a neural network (spatial embeddings + MLP), without explicit spatial covariance specification. In contrast to existing negative binomial regression approaches in seismological forecasting, which typically assume a single global alpha, the proposed per-cell formulation allows the model to identify spatial heterogeneity in seismic clustering and to construct probabilistic risk-aware alerts via quantiles of the predicted distribution. A walk-forward evaluation (2018-2023) over four systems shows an 8.6 percent reduction in mean pinball deviation (MPD) relative to a negative binomial GLM baseline. The strongest improvements are observed in the tail regime (Y >= 5), where the continuous ranked probability score (CRPS) of the proposed model is 12.5 percent lower than that of the baseline, indicating improved calibration in extreme-event forecasting.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper introduces EarthquakeNet, a neural negative binomial grid model that learns per-cell overdispersion for weekly earthquake counts in Central Asia and yields improved probabilistic tail-risk forecasts versus a negative binomial GLM baseline.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该文提出EarthquakeNet神经负二项网格模型，为中亚每个空间格点学习超离散度并预测每周地震计数概率分布，其在尾部风险预警上优于负二项GLM基线。
summary_en: problem: Poisson-based weekly gridded seismicity forecasts assume equidispersion, yet earthquake counts show strong overdispersion and non-uniform clustering across space.

approach: EarthquakeNet replaces a single global negative-binomial dispersion with an endogenous per-cell overdispersion estimated by spatial embeddings plus an MLP using physics-inspired lagged predictors, then evaluates quantile- and distribution-based tail metrics.

key result: In a walk-forward 2018–2023 evaluation over four systems in Central Asia (2010–2024 USGS catalog), the proposed model reduces mean pinball deviation and improves tail-event calibration, with reported MPD and CRPS gains over the negative-binomial GLM baseline.
summary_zh: problem: 用泊松分布的每周格网地震预测通常假设条件等离散，但真实地震计数存在显著过离散且空间聚集强度不均。
approach: EarthquakeNet将负二项分布从“全局单一超离散度”改为“每个格点内生估计”，用空间嵌入加MLP处理物理启发的滞后特征，并用分位数与分布层面的指标评估尾部风险。
key result: 在中亚基于USGS 2010–2024数据的2018–2023滚动评测（四个系统）中，模型相对负二项GLM基线在整体误差与尾部事件校准上均有改进，文中给出MPD与尾部CRPS的提升幅度。
analysis.contribution_en: It formally tests and rejects the Poisson equidispersion assumption for weekly gridded earthquake counts in Central Asia, and proposes EarthquakeNet that learns per-cell negative-binomial dispersion without explicitly modeling spatial covariance, improving probabilistic and tail-risk forecasting relative to a negative-binomial GLM.
analysis.contribution_zh: 文中用似然比检验（带边界校正）形式化地证明中亚周尺度格网地震计数不满足泊松等离散假设，并提出EarthquakeNet：无需显式空间协方差建模而直接为每个格点学习负二项的超离散度，从而在概率与尾部风险预测上优于负二项GLM。
analysis.method_en: Weekly counts on a 3°×3° spatial grid are modeled with a negative binomial distribution whose per-cell overdispersion parameter is produced by a neural network (spatial embeddings plus an MLP) using lagged, physics-inspired predictors (e.g., seismic energy proxies, seismic gap since last large event, and rolling activity windows); forecasts are assessed with walk-forward validation and quantile/tail distribution scoring.
analysis.method_zh: 将地震周尺度计数离散到3°×3°网格，并用负二项分布建模；每个格点的超离散度由神经网络（空间嵌入+MLP）基于物理启发的滞后特征（如能量代理、距上次大震的间隔、滚动活动窗口等）内生生成；通过滚动走前评测并用分位数与尾部分布评分来评估预测质量。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Central Asia (Tian Shan and Pamir), USGS earthquake catalog from 2010 to early 2024; analysis focuses on magnitude completeness filtering (Mc estimated ~4.5) and uses weekly gridded targets with magnitude threshold M≥3.0.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 中亚（天山与帕米尔）地区，使用USGS开放地震目录2010年至2024年初；通过完备度阈值（文中Mc约为4.5）进行筛选，并以M≥3.0为阈值构建每周格网目标。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is highly relevant to probabilistic seismicity forecasting because it targets a core statistical issue (overdispersion and spatial heterogeneity) and improves extreme-event calibration for risk-aware alerts in a tectonically complex region.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这与概率地震预测高度相关，因为它针对地震统计中的关键问题（过离散与空间异质性），并在构建风险敏感的极端事件预警方面提升了尾部事件的概率校准。

paper.title: Beyond Vorticity: An Angular Momentum Perspective on Fluid Flow
paper.abstract: While vorticity is the classical tool for analyzing rotational fluid kinematics, it inherently focuses on local, differential spin. This paper introduces a complementary framework based on the angular momentum density field, $\mathbf{L} = \mathbf{r} \times \mathbf{u}$, deriving generalized transport equations that explicitly balance macroscopic torque and rotational momentum. This $\mathbf{L}$ perspective offers several distinct theoretical advantages over traditional velocity/vorticity formulations. Specifically, this approach: (i) provides a novel decomposition of the viscous torque into a diffusive component and a local spin dissipative term; (ii) shows the mechanism by which lift is generated in viscous boundary layers by vorticity acting as a source of angular momentum; it also explains stall (iii) reformulates the hydrodynamic impulse to yield a remarkably clean separation of terms into dilatational, volumetric, and rotational flux components; The $\mathbf{L}$ formalism provides the kinematic closure necessary to unify non-circulatory added mass and circulatory lift within a single, dimensionally consistent budget. (iv) enables the direct calculation of the viscous added mass force, accounting for the inertial resistance of boundary layers and separated wakes; (v) simplifies geophysical fluid dynamics by absorbing the planet's rotation, traditionally treated as an artificial virtual vorticity term which directly gets absorbed into the conserved axial angular momentum $m$, revealing the fundamental physics of global circulation through explicit torque balances; (vi) identifies the rotlet as a fundamental Green's function for the $\mathbf{L}$ transport equation in the Stokes regime; and (vii) demonstrates that both oblique shocks and vortex sheets act as singular sources of $\mathbf{L}$ that turn the macroscopic flow.

analysis.one_sentence_en: This paper proposes an angular-momentum-density framework for fluid flows that derives transport equations with explicit torque balance, revealing new physical decompositions for viscous effects, lift generation, and geophysical circulation.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文提出基于流体角动量密度的框架，推导显式扭矩平衡的输运方程，并揭示黏性效应分解、升力产生机制及地球流体环流的统一物理图像。
summary_en: problem: Vorticity analysis captures only local differential spin and obscures nonlocal torque and several geophysical/viscous mechanisms.
approach: Formulate a complementary transport theory for angular momentum density and derive its generalized balance laws, including viscous torque decomposition and boundary-layer limits.

key result: The angular-momentum-density (L) perspective yields explicit torque/flux budgets, explains lift via vorticity as an angular-momentum source, provides a clean separation for hydrodynamic impulse, unifies added-mass and lift, and absorbs planetary rotation into conserved axial angular momentum.
summary_zh: problem: 涡量分析主要反映局部的差分自旋，难以清晰呈现扭矩平衡与若干黏性/地球流体机制中的非局部物理。
approach: 构建角动量密度的输运理论并推导其广义平衡方程，重点给出黏性扭矩分解与边界层极限解释。
key result: L视角给出显式的扭矩与通量预算，解释升力来自涡量作为角动量源，并将水动力冲量实现更清晰的项分离，同时统一非环流附加质量与环流升力，还将行星自转并入守恒的轴向角动量。
analysis.contribution_en: A unified angular-momentum-density formulation is derived for incompressible (and later compressible) flows, producing transport and flux-balance laws that reorganize viscous torque, lift generation, hydrodynamic impulse, viscous added-mass, and geophysical circulation in terms of angular-momentum budgets.
analysis.contribution_zh: 本文提出并推导了以角动量密度为核心的流动统一表述，得到输运与通量平衡关系，用角动量预算重新组织黏性扭矩、升力产生、水动力冲量、黏性附加质量以及地球流体环流等关键机制。
analysis.method_en: Define angular momentum density as position cross velocity and derive a corresponding transport equation by taking r-cross of the Navier–Stokes momentum equation; analyze viscous torque via decomposition into diffusive and local spin-dissipative terms and apply boundary-layer and flux-integral arguments to link vorticity sources to lift and other global quantities (also noting extensions toward compressible flows and Stokes-regime Green’s functions).
analysis.method_zh: 将角动量密度定义为位置向量与速度的叉积，并通过对Navier–Stokes动量方程做r叉积推导得到对应的输运方程；再用“扩散项+局部自旋耗散项”的方式分解黏性扭矩，并结合边界层与通量积分论证，把涡量源与升力等全局量建立联系（同时讨论可压缩推广与Stokes极限下的格林函数性质）。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: It is relevant to geophysical fluid dynamics because the framework claims to remove the need for treating planetary rotation as an artificial virtual vorticity term, embedding it into a conserved axial angular momentum budget.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地球流体动力学相关：该框架声称可将行星自转从“虚拟涡量”的人工处理方式中移除，并直接并入守恒的轴向角动量扭矩平衡。

paper.title: A Fixed-Grid Affine-Constrained Multiwavelet Coefficient Method for Buckley--Leverett Shock Capturing
paper.abstract: We present a fixed-grid conservative affine-constrained modal/multiwavelet coefficient method for one-dimensional Buckley--Leverett saturation transport. The saturation is evolved directly in a local orthonormal coefficient basis with a mean/detail structure: the first mode carries the conservative cell average, whereas higher modes carry zero-mean local details. The hyperbolic inflow condition is imposed as a linear trace constraint on the coefficient vector and enforced by affine lifting. For $(p>1)$, the boundary reprojection is applied in the detail subspace of the inflow cell, so that the prescribed trace is restored without modifying the conservative cell-average update. The transport operator is discretized in conservative weak form with monotone numerical fluxes, and shock-induced oscillations are controlled by a troubled-cell limiter acting on modal details. The method is validated on a Berea-core waterflood benchmark against an independent \texttt{pywaterflood} reference solution using the same Corey fractional-flow closure, physical parameters, and pore-volume-injected scaling. The affine-constrained coefficient solver reproduces the reference breakthrough curve and saturation profiles, preserves the imposed inflow trace to roundoff accuracy, controls saturation bounds through mean-preserving detail rescaling, and gives small accumulated global mass-balance defects. Mesh-refinement, flux-comparison, and modal-order studies show that $(p=2)$, corresponding to a piecewise-linear local representation, provides the most favorable accuracy--cost compromise among the tested orders for this shock-dominated benchmark.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper develops a fixed-grid affine-constrained modal/multiwavelet coefficient scheme for 1D Buckley–Leverett saturation shocks, enforcing inflow traces in coefficient space while limiting detail modes to prevent oscillations and preserve conservation.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文提出一种固定网格的仿射约束模态/多小波系数方法，用于一维 Buckley–Leverett 饱和度激波问题，并在系数空间中强制入口边界，同时对细节模态限幅以抑制振荡并保持守恒。
summary_en: problem: Accurately capturing Buckley–Leverett shock-driven saturation fronts on a fixed grid while enforcing the hyperbolic inflow boundary condition in a coefficient-based discretization without breaking conservation.

approach: Evolve saturation directly in a local orthonormal mean/detail modal/multiwavelet coefficient basis using conservative weak-form flux coupling, impose inflow as an affine trace constraint via affine lifting, and apply a troubled-cell limiter to zero-mean detail coefficients.

key result: Validated on a Berea-core waterflood benchmark against an independent pywaterflood reference, the method reproduces breakthrough curves and saturation profiles, preserves the imposed inflow trace to roundoff accuracy, maintains saturation bounds via mean-preserving detail rescaling, and shows small global mass-balance defects with p=2 best accuracy–cost tradeoff.
summary_zh: problem: 在固定网格上准确捕捉 Buckley–Leverett 由激波主导的饱和度前沿，并在基于系数的离散框架中可靠强制双曲入口边界且不破坏守恒。
approach: 使用局部正交“均值/细节”模态/多小波系数表示饱和度，采用保守弱式界面通量耦合，在系数空间用仿射约束与仿射提升强制入口迹，并对零均值细节系数施加受扰单元限幅。
key result: 在 Berea-core 水驱基准上与独立 pywaterflood 参考计算对比，该方法能复现突破曲线与饱和度剖面，入口迹保持到舍入误差水平，借助“均值保持的细节重缩放”控制饱和度上下界，并给出较小的累计全局质量守恒偏差；测试的阶次中 p=2 在精度-成本折中最优。
analysis.contribution_en: A conservative fixed-grid coefficient-space discretization that enforces the hyperbolic inflow trace through an affine constraint on local multiwavelet/modal coefficients (with detail-only boundary reprojection for higher orders) while coupling cells via monotone numerical fluxes and controlling shocks using a detail-mode troubled-cell limiter.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种保守的固定网格系数空间离散方案：通过对局部多小波/模态系数施加仿射约束来在双曲问题中强制入口迹（并在高阶情形仅对入口单元的细节子空间进行边界重投影），同时用单调数值通量保守耦合单元，并通过对细节模态的受扰单元限幅抑制激波振荡。
analysis.method_en: 1D Buckley–Leverett hyperbolic saturation equation discretized in a local orthonormal modal/multiwavelet mean/detail coefficient basis (cell average in the mean mode, zero-mean details in higher modes); conservative weak-form assembly with monotone interface fluxes (e.g., Rusanov); inflow imposed as an affine trace constraint with affine lifting and (for p>1) detail-subspace boundary reprojection that preserves the inflow cell mean; shock oscillations controlled by a troubled-cell limiter acting on modal details; validated with p-order and mesh-refinement studies against a pywaterflood reference.
analysis.method_zh: 将一维 Buckley–Leverett 双曲饱和度方程用局部正交模态/多小波“均值/细节”基表示进行离散（均值模态承载单元平均，较高模态为零均值细节）；采用保守弱式组装并用单调界面数值通量（如 Rusanov）进行单元耦合；将入口通过仿射迹约束并用仿射提升强制实施（p>1 时仅在入口单元的细节子空间做边界重投影以保持入口单元均值不变）；用作用于模态细节的受扰单元限幅控制激波振荡；并通过阶次与网格加密研究与 pywaterflood 参考解验证。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Berea-core waterflood benchmark (1D core) using the same Corey fractional-flow closure, physical parameters, and pore-volume-injected scaling as an independent pywaterflood reference; inflow boundary uses injected-water saturation with residual oil saturation.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: Berea-core 水驱基准（1D 核），与独立 pywaterflood 参考计算使用相同 Corey 分数流闭合、物理参数和孔隙体积注入标度；入口边界取注入水饱和度（残余油饱和度给定）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Reservoir-flow hyperbolic saturation-shock capturing is tangentially relevant to geophysical transport and front-tracking challenges, but the focus is on petroleum immiscible displacement numerics rather than geophysical field observations.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 该工作与地球科学中传输方程的激波/前沿捕捉等数值难题存在弱相关，因为研究聚焦于油藏非混相位移的饱和度输运数值实现，而非直接面向地球物理观测或特定地球物理数据。

paper.title: Hybrid Machine Learning Model for Forest Height Estimation from TanDEM-X and Landsat Data
paper.abstract: Integrating machine learning (ML) with physical models (PM) has emerged as a promising way of retrieving geophysical parameters from remote sensing data. In this context, a ML model for estimating forest height from TanDEM-X interferometric coherence measurements has recently been proposed, that constrains the learning process through a PM. While the features used for training and inversion where selected to ensure the physical consistency of the solutions, they could not resolve all height / structure and baseline / terrain slope ambiguities in the data. To improve this, the extension of the feature space with optical Landsat data is proposed able to provide complementary information on forest type or structure. The extended model is applied and validated on several TanDEM-X acquisitions over the Gabonese Lopé national park site and assessed against airborne LiDAR measurements. Results show a 13.5% reduction in RMSE and a 16.6% reduction in MAE compared to the original hybrid model, confirming the added value of multispectral inputs.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper improves a hybrid physical–machine-learning inversion for TanDEM-X interferometric coherence–based forest height by adding optical Landsat bands, reducing height errors versus airborne LiDAR at the Lopé site.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文通过在TanDEM-X相干度混合物理-机器学习反演中引入Landsat光学波段，提升森林高度反演精度，并在Lopé地区相对机载LiDAR验证误差显著降低。
summary_en: problem: Existing hybrid TanDEM-X InSAR forest-height inversion cannot fully resolve height/structure and baseline–terrain-slope ambiguities, limiting robustness across forest and terrain variability.

approach: Extend the feature space of a physics-constrained MLP that predicts Legendre-series vertical reflectivity profiles by incorporating four Landsat spectral bands alongside TanDEM-X interferometric features, then invert using the physical coherence model and validate against LiDAR.

key result: The extended model (with Landsat bands) achieves lower overall errors than the original hybrid model, reporting a 13.5% RMSE reduction and a 16.6% MAE reduction and improved robustness, especially across difficult coherence/geometry conditions.
summary_zh: problem: 现有的TanDEM-X InSAR森林高度混合反演难以完全消除高度/结构与基线-地形坡度相关歧义，导致在不同森林与地形条件下鲁棒性不足。
approach: 在物理约束的MLP（预测Legendre级数垂直散射反射率剖面）输入中加入四个Landsat光谱波段，利用物理相干度模型进行高度反演，并用LiDAR进行验证。
key result: 引入Landsat多光谱输入的扩展模型相较原模型总体误差更低，给出RMSE降低13.5%、MAE降低16.6%，并在低相干与复杂几何条件下表现更稳健。
analysis.contribution_en: It proposes a multimodal extension of a physics-constrained InSAR/ML hybrid framework by adding Landsat spectral bands to better determine the vertical reflectivity profile and resolve remaining ambiguities, demonstrating improved forest-height accuracy validated with LVIS LiDAR.
analysis.contribution_zh: 本文提出了一个多模态扩展：在物理约束的InSAR/ML混合框架中加入Landsat光谱波段，更好估计垂直反射率剖面，从而缓解剩余歧义；并在LVIS机载LiDAR验证中展示了森林高度精度提升。
analysis.method_en: A multi-layer perceptron predicts coefficients of a Legendre-series vertical reflectivity profile from TanDEM-X interferometric coherence–derived features (volume coherence magnitude, terrain-corrected vertical wavenumber, incidence angle, terrain slope) optionally augmented with four Landsat bands; the predicted profile is then inserted into a physical coherence model to invert forest height.
analysis.method_zh: 使用多层感知机根据TanDEM-X相干度特征（体相干幅度、地形校正垂直波数、入射角、地形坡度），以及加入的四个Landsat光谱波段（扩展版本），预测垂直反射率剖面Legendre级数系数；再将该剖面代入物理相干度模型完成森林高度反演。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Lopé National Park, Gabon; several TanDEM-X acquisitions over the site; optical Landsat bands derived from the Hansen Global Forest Change v1.7 (circa 2019 cloud-free composite) and reference forest height from NASA LVIS full-waveform LiDAR RH98 (resampled to 20 m).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 加蓬Lopé国家公园；覆盖该区域的多次TanDEM-X观测；从Hansen Global Forest Change v1.7（约2019年无云合成，必要时回退到2010–2015）提取的Landsat光谱波段；参考森林高度来自NASA LVIS全波形机载LiDAR的RH98指标，并统一重采样到20 m分辨率。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Accurate forest-height estimation from InSAR coherence supports biomass and forest structure studies, and the paper’s ambiguity reduction improves the practicality of physics-constrained InSAR inversion for complex tropical canopies; relevance is strong though it is remote sensing rather than seismology.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 更准确的InSAR森林高度反演可用于生物量与森林结构研究，该论文通过多模态输入缓解反演歧义从而提升在热带复杂林冠下的实用性；与当前追踪主题的相关性较强，但属于遥感/生态地球科学而非地球物理地震类。

paper.title: HyFrac.fun: A 3D Hydraulic Fracturing Simulator on Cloud
paper.abstract: When multiple hydraulic fractures propagate simultaneously from a horizontal wellbore, elastic stress-shadow interactions generate complex non-planar three-dimensional geometries whose effect on subsequent reservoir drainage has infrequently been quantified, because the propagation and production solvers have historically been incompatible stand-alone tools. This paper presents HyFrac.fun, a cloud-native platform that bridges this gap by exploiting a structural isomorphism between the two SGBEM--FEM governing operator systems. The platform enables automated zero-conversion handoff of the evolved 3D fracture mesh directly to the steady-state Darcy production solver for realizing a fully integrated lifecycle simulation of multi-stage non-planar hydraulic fractures. The lifecycle analysis reveals a double shadow phenomenon: the mechanical stress shadow that suppresses inner-fracture growth during stimulation mirrors a fluid pressure shadow that reduces the inner fracture's drawout rate at small cluster spacing. Critically, switching to a shear-thinning power-law fracturing fluid leaves the fracture trajectories and production rates almost unchanged, demonstrating that stress-shadow-controlled fracture geometry instead of fluid rheology is the primary determinant of long-term production efficiency at equal injection rates. These physics findings are accessible from integrated fracture propagation and production simulations.

analysis.one_sentence_en: HyFrac.fun is a cloud-native workflow that automatically couples a 3D hydraulic-fracture SGBEM–FEM propagation solver to a steady-state Darcy production solver, enabling lifecycle simulations where stress shadows control both geometry and long-term productivity more than fracturing-fluid rheology.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: HyFrac.fun 构建了云端工作流，将三维水力压裂传播的SGBEM–FEM求解器与稳态Darcy产能求解器自动无缝耦合，实现全生命周期模拟，并指出应力影效应主导几何形态与长期产能而非流体流变性。
summary_en: problem: Existing hydraulic-fracture simulators often cannot directly and automatically transfer evolving non-planar 3D fracture meshes from propagation to production solvers, limiting quantification of how stress-shadow-generated 3D geometry affects drainage and long-term output.

approach: The authors develop HyFrac.fun, a cloud-native SaaS platform that exploits structural operator isomorphism between their SGBEM–FEM fracture propagation and Darcy-based steady-state production formulations to enable zero-conversion handoff of evolved 3D meshes and run integrated lifecycle simulations.

key result: Lifecycle analyses reveal a “double shadow” where mechanical stress suppresses inner-fracture growth and the resulting pressure shadow reduces drawout rate at small cluster spacing; changing to a shear-thinning power-law fluid leaves trajectories and production rates nearly unchanged at equal injection rates, implying stress-shadow-controlled fracture geometry is the primary driver of long-term efficiency.
summary_zh: problem: 现有压裂模拟工具通常难以自动、直接地把传播过程演化的非平面三维裂缝网格交给产能求解器，从而难以定量评估应力影效应生成的三维几何如何影响后续泄放与长期产出。
approach: 作者提出 HyFrac.fun 云端SaaS平台，利用传播与产能两类求解框架之间的算子结构同构，实现演化三维裂缝网格的零转换交接，并进行全生命周期一体化仿真。
key result: 生命周期结果显示“双重影子”：力学应力影会抑制内侧裂缝扩展，同时由此产生的流体压力影在小簇间距下降低内侧裂缝的延伸/抽吸速率；将流体改为剪切变稀的幂律后，在相同注入率下裂缝轨迹与产能几乎不变，表明长期效率主要由应力影控制的裂缝几何决定。
analysis.contribution_en: A cloud-native integrated simulation platform that bridges 3D hydraulic-fracture propagation and steady-state Darcy production by leveraging structural operator isomorphism for automated, zero-conversion mesh handoff, enabling lifecycle “double shadow” physics assessment.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种云端一体化仿真平台：通过利用传播与产能框架的算子结构同构，实现演化三维裂缝网格的自动零转换交接，从而支持全生命周期耦合分析并揭示“双重影子”物理规律。
analysis.method_en: SGBEM–FEM 3D hydraulic-fracture propagation with adaptive remeshing and Newton-type nonlinear coupling, followed by steady-state Darcy production solved on the propagated fracture geometry; HyFrac.fun orchestrates input generation, cloud job execution, and direct mesh handoff using an operator isomorphism, with server-side rendering for visualization.
analysis.method_zh: 三维水力压裂传播采用SGBEM–FEM（含自适应重网格与牛顿类非线性耦合），并将传播得到的裂缝几何直接用于稳态Darcy产能求解；HyFrac.fun 通过算子同构编排云端任务、自动生成输入并实现裂缝网格的直接交接，结果在服务器端渲染并交互可视化。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: For hydraulic fracturing research, this provides an end-to-end way to quantify how multi-stage, non-planar 3D fracture geometry (driven by stress shadows) propagates into reservoir drainage and long-term productivity; it is more about the integrated simulation workflow and physics findings than a new field dataset.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 对水力压裂研究很有参考价值：它提供端到端的手段量化多级、非平面三维裂缝几何（由应力影主导）如何影响储层泄放与长期产能；重点偏向集成仿真流程与物理结论，而非新的现场数据。

paper.title: Benchmarking Cylindrical Blast Wave Theory Against the OSIRIS-REx Sample Return Capsule Reentry
paper.abstract: Weak shock theory based on cylindrical blast waves has been used to interpret meteor infrasound, but it has not been systematically benchmarked against a non-ablating hypersonic source with independently known parameters. The objective of this study is not to propose a new theoretical framework, but to evaluate the operational validity of the existing suite of blast radius formulations against a high-fidelity ground truth dataset. The OSIRIS-REx Sample Return Capsule reentry on 24 September 2023 provides such a benchmark because the capsule geometry, trajectory, and infrasound emission points are constrained from mission data and ray tracing, reducing source-side uncertainty associated with ablation. Using observations from 39 infrasound stations, this benchmarking study evaluates six published blast radius (R_0) formulations and three weak-shock transition coefficients (C) within a stratified atmospheric propagation model to predict signal period and peak overpressure. The benchmarking identifies the Sakurai formulation as the best-performing formulation for non-ablating bodies, with the Jones/Plooster formulation performing comparably when a physically appropriate C is adopted. Sakurai and Jones/Plooster yield linear-period median absolute percentage residuals of 9% and 11%, respectively. The period predictions show only weak sensitivity to C at these propagation distances. The Mach-diameter approximation commonly used in meteor studies overestimates R_0 by more than a factor of 3 in the absence of ablation. These results establish a performance baseline for applying cylindrical blast wave theory to non-ablating hypersonic bodies and demonstrate that the signal period is a robust observable for constraining R_0.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The study benchmarks multiple cylindrical weak-shock blast-radius formulations and transition coefficients using OSIRIS-REx capsule reentry infrasound, finding Sakurai best for non-ablating bodies and showing period is a robust constraint.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该研究用OSIRIS-REx返回舱再入的39站甚低频信号基准评估圆柱弱激波爆炸半径公式与转变系数，发现Sakurai最适用于非消融源且周期是稳健约束量。
summary_en: problem: Weak-shock cylindrical blast-wave theory is used for infrasound from fast bodies, but its operational validity for non-ablating hypersonic sources is not systematically benchmarked.

approach: Use the OSIRIS-REx Sample Return Capsule reentry (24 Sep 2023) as constrained ground truth, propagate weak-shock theory through a stratified atmosphere, and fit predicted signal period and peak overpressure to 39 infrasound stations.

key result: Sakurai’s blast-radius formulation performs best for non-ablating bodies; Jones/Plooster can match comparably with an appropriate weak-shock transition coefficient, and the common Mach-diameter approximation overestimates blast radius by >3 without ablation.
summary_zh: problem: 圆柱弱激波爆炸理论常用于解释快速天体甚低频，但尚缺乏针对非消融高超声源的系统有效性基准测试。
approach: 利用OSIRIS-REx返回舱再入（2023-09-24）作为物理约束的“真值”，在分层大气中前向传播弱激波理论，并与39站甚低频观测对比信号周期与峰值超压。
key result: 对非消融源Sakurai半径公式表现最佳；在选取合适弱激波转变系数后，Jones/Plooster可达到相近效果；而不考虑消融时Mach-diameter近似将爆炸半径高估超过3倍。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides the first systematic, source-side constrained benchmarking of cylindrical weak-shock blast-radius formulations for a non-ablating hypersonic body using a high-fidelity infrasound dataset, yielding an operational performance baseline for future inverse/interpretation workflows.
analysis.contribution_zh: 首次在源端物理参数被约束的条件下，对非消融高超声目标开展圆柱弱激波爆炸半径公式的系统基准测试，并给出面向未来反演/解释的可操作性能基线。
analysis.method_en: Forward and (for interpretation) inverse use of cylindrical weak-shock blast-wave theory in a stratified atmospheric propagation model, testing six published blast-radius normalizations and three weak-shock-to-linear transition coefficients against 39-station infrasound observations with ray-traced emission points for the OSIRIS-REx capsule.
analysis.method_zh: 在分层大气传播模型中前向（并用于解释的反演）应用圆柱弱激波爆炸波理论，测试6种已发表爆炸半径归一化与3种弱激波到线性转变系数，并利用射线追踪得到的发射点将预测的周期与峰值超压与39站OSIRIS-REx再入甚低频观测进行对比。
analysis.data_or_region_en: OSIRIS-REx Sample Return Capsule reentry on 24 September 2023, using infrasound recordings from 39 stations with capsule geometry/trajectory and emission points constrained by mission data and ray tracing; region: Nevada and Utah (implied by station deployment).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: OSIRIS-REx返回舱再入（2023-09-24），使用39站甚低频观测；返回舱几何/轨迹与发射点由任务数据和射线追踪约束；站点布设地点在内华达州与犹他州（从文中描述推断）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This matters for atmospheric infrasound interpretation relevant to nuclear-test monitoring and bolide/reentry characterization, because it supplies a performance baseline and identifies which blast-radius formulation and observable (period) are most reliable for non-ablating hypersonic sources.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这对大气甚低频的业务化解释很关键（如核试验监测与火球/再入特征刻画），因为它给出了非消融高超声源的性能基线，并指出哪种爆炸半径公式以及周期观测更可靠。

paper.title: FiLark: a streaming-first software framework for end-to-end exploration, annotation, and algorithm integration in distributed acoustic sensing
paper.abstract: Distributed acoustic sensing (DAS) systems generate continuous, ultra-high-channel-count data streams at rates that exceed the capabilities of conventional batch-oriented analysis frameworks. As a result, essential tasks such as interactive exploration of long-duration recordings, scalable event annotation, and real-time algorithm-in-the-loop monitoring remain inadequately supported by workflows built around manually selected data segments and offline processing. This paper presents FiLark (Fiber Lark), a Python framework that applies a \emph{streaming-first} principle uniformly across data access, signal processing, visualization and monitoring for DAS. Instead of operating on manually selected data segments, FiLark presents any DAS sources-including continuous multi-file recordings-as a unified stream and builds all system components around that abstraction. An OpenGL-based ring-buffer renderer enables interactive browsing and visualization of arbitrarily long recordings with constant memory usage. An integrated annotation interface supports event labeling directly within continuous data streams, facilitating the creation of reproducible machine-learning-ready labeled datasets without offline preprocessing. The signal processing library includes temporal, spatial, spectral, and decomposition-based operators, with both CPU implementations and GPU-accelerated variants via PyTorch, alongside stateful chunked execution that preserves processing continuity and application semantics across segment boundaries. A standardized monitor interface further integrates streaming detectors and learning-based models into the visualization workflow. By sharing a common streaming abstraction across all layers, FiLark allows processing configurations and workflows developed interactively to transfer directly to scalable production pipelines without modification.

analysis.one_sentence_en: FiLark is a streaming-first Python framework that unifies DAS continuous data access, interactive GPU rendering, in-stream event annotation, and stateful CPU/GPU processing for seamless exploration-to-production workflows.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: FiLark 是一个以流式为先的 Python 框架，将 DAS 连续数据访问、交互式 GPU 渲染、流内事件标注以及有状态的 CPU/GPU 处理统一起来，支持从探索到生产的无缝工作流。
summary_en: problem: Existing DAS analysis tools are batch-first, making it hard to interactively browse long continuous recordings and to label events reproducibly while supporting scalable streaming processing and detector integration.

approach: FiLark treats DAS sources (including multi-file continuous recordings) as a single unified stream, using a constant-memory OpenGL ring-buffer viewer, an integrated in-stream annotation interface, and a stateful chunked CPU/GPU signal-processing library plus a standardized streaming monitor plugin interface.

key result: The framework provides end-to-end streaming abstractions that keep interactive browsing, in-view labeling, and processing configurations consistent when moved to scalable batch execution, while enabling real-time detector overlays within the same visualization workflow.
summary_zh: problem: 现有 DAS 工具多为批处理范式，导致长时连续记录难以高效交互浏览、事件标注难以复现，并且与可扩展的流式处理与探测器集成支持不足。
approach: FiLark 将多文件连续 DAS 数据作为统一数据流抽象，采用固定内存的 OpenGL 环形缓冲渲染器、流式内集成标注界面，以及具跨块边界连续性的 CPU/GPU（PyTorch）有状态算子与标准化流式监控接口。
key result: FiLark 通过全栈共享的流式抽象实现探索态交互设置与生产态可扩展批处理的一致性，并可在同一可视化会话中把流式探测结果以叠加事件形式实时呈现。
analysis.contribution_en: FiLark’s core contribution is a unified streaming-first software architecture for DAS that consistently supports constant-memory interactive visualization, continuous in-stream annotation, stateful chunked CPU/GPU signal processing, and real-time detector/monitor integration within a single coordinate-consistent workflow.
analysis.contribution_zh: FiLark 的核心贡献在于提出了面向 DAS 的统一“流式优先”软件架构：在固定内存下支持连续交互式可视化、在流内完成事件标注、提供具有跨块边界连续性的 CPU/GPU 有状态信号处理，并能在同一坐标一致的工作流中集成实时探测器/监控结果。
analysis.method_en: The method is a Python framework built around a streaming abstraction for DAS multi-file continuous sources, combining an OpenGL ring-buffer GPU renderer with an in-stream annotation UI, a CPU/GPU operator library (including PyTorch acceleration) featuring stateful overlap-aware chunk execution, and a standardized streaming monitor/plugin interface that feeds detector events back to the visualization.
analysis.method_zh: 方法是一个基于 DAS 流式抽象的 Python 框架：将多文件连续数据统一为流；配合 OpenGL 环形缓冲 GPU 渲染器与流内标注交互界面；提供带状态的重叠感知分块执行算子库（含 PyTorch GPU 加速）；并通过标准化的流式监控/插件接口把探测器事件回传到可视化层。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified (framework described generally for continuous DAS sources, including multi-file recordings; examples mention ocean deployments but no specific dataset/region is provided in the excerpt).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明（文中总体描述面向连续 DAS 数据源与多文件记录的通用框架；示例提到海洋部署，但在摘录中未给出具体数据集或区域）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: High relevance to DAS workflows because it targets interactive browsing, reproducible event labeling, and streaming detector integration—capabilities that directly address practical bottlenecks in seismology and infrastructure/ocean acoustic monitoring.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与 DAS 工作流高度相关，因为它直接面向交互式长时浏览、可复现的事件标注以及流式探测器集成，这些都对应地震学与基础设施/海洋声学监测中的实际瓶颈。

paper.title: Take It or Leave It: Intent-Controlled Partial Optimal Transport
paper.abstract: While optimal transport (OT) enforces a rigid constraint by requiring two measures to be matched exactly, partial optimal transport relaxes this requirement by allowing mass to remain unmatched through a global budget, scalar rebate, or uniform rejection rule. However, many applications call for more structured, pointwise rejection mechanisms, where the decision to leave mass unmatched depends on side-specific reliability, support geometry, or external information about which components should participate in the comparison. We introduce \emph{intent-controlled partial optimal transport} (IC-POT), a targeted generalization of partial transport that replaces the global rejection paradigm with pointwise rejection costs over both measures. We show that the resulting optimization problem admits a dual interpretation in terms of local acceptance thresholds and can be solved by recasting it as a balanced Kantorovich OT problem on an augmented support. Beyond theoretical analysis, we demonstrate the practical relevance of IC-POT in settings where rejection is driven by side information. In positive-unlabeled learning and open-partial domain adaptation, incorporating pointwise rejection rules that encode statistical structure improves fixed baseline pipelines. Finally, we motivate the use of IC-POT with a geophysical practical case: multi-modal satellite ocean measurements, for which physical and sensors priors naturally inform the rejection mechanism and define the retrieved comparable signal information.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Intent-controlled partial optimal transport replaces global rejection in partial OT with pointwise, side-specific rejection costs to decide locally which mass should be compared or left unmatched.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 意图控制的部分最优传输用每个样本点、且区分源端/目标端的逐点拒绝成本，替代部分OT中的全局拒绝机制来决定哪些质量可比、哪些应不匹配。
summary_en: problem: Classical/partial OT reject mass using global budgets or uniform rules, which cannot represent structured, pointwise rejection driven by side reliability, geometry, or priors.

approach: Propose intent-controlled partial optimal transport (IC-POT) with slack variables on the original supports and pointwise unmatched costs on both measures, yielding a dual view with local acceptance thresholds and an augmented-support OT solver.

key result: IC-POT admits an equivalent reduced Lagrangian and dual caps that imply an exact edge-activation sparsity rule, and improves baseline performance on positive-unlabeled learning and open-partial domain adaptation; it is also demonstrated on multimodal satellite ocean-wave spectra where physical/sensor priors define the comparable signal.
summary_zh: problem: 传统/部分OT通常用全局预算或统一规则来拒绝质量，难以表达由侧端可靠性、几何或先验驱动的结构化、逐点拒绝决策。
approach: 提出意图控制的部分最优传输（IC-POT），在原始支持上加入松弛变量，并在源端与目标端用逐点未匹配成本刻画拒绝策略；其对偶解释为局部接受阈值，并可通过扩展支持重写为平衡Kantorovich OT求解。
key result: IC-POT给出与经典Lagrangian partial transport的等价化简形式与带上界的对偶caps，推出精确的边激活稀疏性规则；在正-无标签学习与开放部分域适应中相对常数成本partial OT的基线管线更有效，并在多模态卫星海洋波谱中用物理/传感器先验定义可比信号。
analysis.contribution_en: The paper introduces IC-POT, a partial OT generalization where leaving mass unmatched is controlled by pointwise, side-specific rejection costs, providing equivalent reduced/dual formulations with local acceptance thresholds, an exact admissibility sparsity rule, and practical gains in structured reject-need tasks plus a geophysical satellite-wave case.
analysis.contribution_zh: 论文提出IC-POT：将“不匹配就拒绝”的控制从全局/统一规则扩展为源端与目标端的逐点、侧特异拒绝成本；给出等价的化简与对偶刻画（局部接受阈值、对偶上界），并得到精确的可行性稀疏性准则；同时在需要结构化拒绝的任务中提升效果，并给出卫星海洋波谱的地球物理应用示例。
analysis.method_en: Formulate partial optimal transport with slack variables representing unmatched mass directly on the original supports, then assign pointwise unmatched costs on both measures; solve via a reduced Lagrangian/dual interpretation and an equivalent balanced OT on an augmented support with a dummy point, enabling sparse admissibility.
analysis.method_zh: 在原始支持上用松弛变量显式表示未匹配（拒绝）的质量，并对源端/目标端分别施加逐点未匹配成本；通过化简的拉格朗日/对偶解释，并把问题等价重写为带虚拟点的扩展支持上的平衡OT求解，同时利用由理论给出的稀疏可行性（边激活）规则。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Geophysical case: multimodal satellite-derived ocean-wave spectra comparing SWIM (CFOSAT) with SAR-derived spectra; learning benchmarks: PU learning and open-partial domain adaptation using side-information-driven reject structures. Not specified: exact datasets and regions beyond these sources.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 地球物理案例：多模态卫星得到的海洋波浪谱，比较SWIM（CFOSAT）与SAR得到的波浪谱；学习基准：用于正-无标签学习与开放部分域适应的结构化拒绝设置。未说明：具体数据集与研究区域。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is relevant because it provides a principled way to decide which parts of co-located, multimodal geophysical measurements should be compared versus rejected, using physical/sensor priors encoded as pointwise rejection costs.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 该方法对地球物理追踪主题有重要意义：它提供了一个原则化框架，用物理/传感器先验（编码为逐点拒绝成本）来决定哪些多模态、近似同位的观测成分应当可比、哪些应被拒绝；论文的地球物理案例也支持这一点。

paper.title: Scalable parallel 3-D TEM inversion via rational approximation of the matrix exponential
paper.abstract: We present a novel parallel implementation for large-scale three-dimensional electromagnetic inversion based on a Gauss-Newton framework combined with a rational near-best approximation of the matrix exponential for transient simulations. The method employs parallel direct solvers for the shifted linear systems arising from the partial fraction representation of the rational approximation and demonstrates efficient parallel execution on a shared-memory architecture using MPI. A key property of the approach is that the time dependence is entirely contained in the residuals of the employed rational functions, such that the computation of forward responses and sensitivities becomes effectively independent of the number of desired observation times. Model regularization is done with smoothness constraints, formulated with Raviart-Thomas elements. The linearized inverse problems are solved using LSQR, using an implicit parallel Jacobian operator. Numerical experiments demonstrate the successful recovery of a synthetic 3-D conductivity structure with approximately 700,000 degrees of freedom. The study further discusses computational bottlenecks related to memory consumption and shared-memory scalability arising from the simultaneous storage of multiple sparse matrix factorizations. Possible improvements based on preconditioned iterative solvers and distributed high-performance computing architectures are outlined. The implementation in the Julia programming language is released as open-source software to support reproducible research and further development by the geophysical inversion community.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper presents a scalable parallel 3-D transient electromagnetic (TEM) inversion that replaces time-marching with a rational approximation of a matrix exponential, enabling forward modeling and sensitivities whose cost is largely independent of the number of observation times.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该论文提出一种可扩展的三维瞬变电磁(TEM)反演方法，用矩阵指数的有理近似替代时间步进，使正演与灵敏度计算成本基本不随观测时刻数量增加而增长。
summary_en: problem: Develop a scalable algorithm for large-scale 3-D transient EM inversion whose runtime does not scale strongly with the number of observation times.

approach: Combine a Gauss-Newton inversion framework with a uniform-in-time rational (near-best) approximation of the matrix exponential, using partial fractions to obtain multiple time-independent shifted linear systems solved in parallel with cached sparse direct factorizations and an implicit parallel Jacobian with LSQR.

key result: Numerical experiments on a synthetic 3-D conductivity model successfully recover the structure with about 700,000 degrees of freedom and demonstrate efficient shared-memory parallel execution; the paper also identifies memory and shared-memory scalability bottlenecks and outlines directions such as preconditioned iterative solvers and distributed HPC.
summary_zh: problem: 构建适用于大规模三维瞬变电磁(TEM)反演的可扩展算法，使运行时间不要显著随观测时刻数量增长。
approach: 将高斯-牛顿反演框架与统一于时间的矩阵指数有理(近最优)近似结合，通过部分分式将问题转化为多个与时间无关的移位线性方程组，在共享内存环境下并行求解并缓存稀疏直接分解，同时用隐式并行雅可比算子与LSQR求解线性化反问题，并用基于Raviart-Thomas RT0的平滑正则化。
key result: 在合成三维电导率模型上（约70万自由度）能够成功恢复目标结构，并展示高效共享内存并行；同时指出因需同时存储多组稀疏矩阵分解带来的内存与可扩展性瓶颈，并给出预条件迭代解法和分布式HPC等改进方向。
analysis.contribution_en: It provides an end-to-end scalable parallel TEM inversion workflow by propagating a rational matrix-exponential reformulation through both forward modeling and Jacobian-based Gauss-Newton updates, including practical parallel linear algebra (cached factorizations, implicit parallel Jacobian, LSQR) and an open-source Julia implementation.
analysis.contribution_zh: 它给出了端到端的可扩展并行TEM反演流程：将矩阵指数的有理近似重写贯穿到正演与高斯-牛顿雅可比计算中，并实现了可用的并行线性代数组件（缓存分解、隐式并行雅可比、LSQR），同时提供Julia开源代码。
analysis.method_en: Quasi-static 3-D TEM inversion using a Gauss-Newton scheme with smoothness regularization on Raviart-Thomas RT0 elements; transient forward responses and sensitivities are computed via a uniform-in-time rational approximation of the matrix exponential (RKFIT), whose partial-fraction form yields time-independent shifted systems solved in parallel with cached sparse direct solvers; the linearized inverse problem is solved by LSQR using an implicit parallel Jacobian operator.
analysis.method_zh: 采用基于高斯-牛顿框架的三维准静态TEM反演，并用Raviart-Thomas RT0上的平滑正则化；将统一于时间的矩阵指数有理近似（RKFIT）用于计算瞬变正演响应与灵敏度，部分分式分解带来与时间无关的移位方程组，利用并行共享内存求解并缓存稀疏直接求解器的分解；线性化反问题用LSQR结合隐式并行雅可比算子求解。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Synthetic 3-D test problem with a conductivity model; approximately 700,000 degrees of freedom. No specific real survey region or dataset is described in the excerpt.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 合成三维电导率模型的数值测试；自由度约70万。摘录中未说明具体真实勘探区域或数据集。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is directly relevant to transient EM and 3-D conductivity inversion, offering a computational paradigm that reduces coupling between cost and number of time channels, potentially improving scalability of EM inversion workflows.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 该工作与瞬变电磁和三维电导率反演直接相关，通过降低计算量与时间通道数量之间的耦合，可能显著提升EM反演流程的可扩展性。

paper.title: New NanoSIMS Multielement Isotope Data Reveal CO Novae As Key Sources Of 13C-rich Presolar Silicon Carbide Grains
paper.abstract: We present new multielement NanoSIMS isotopic measurements (C, N, Si, Mg-Al, Ti, and Ni) for four putative nova SiC grains and 79 AB SiC grains from the Murchison meteorite to reassess their stellar origins. High-resolution imaging and a revised Mg/Al relative sensitivity factor for SiC yield substantially improved 26Al/27Al ratios and the most reliable multielement characterization to date for 13C-rich presolar SiC grains. To interpret these data, we computed an expanded suite of hydrodynamic CO, ONe, and recurrent nova models spanning a range of white-dwarf masses and pre-enrichment parameters. When all isotopic systems are considered together (C, N, Mg-Al, Si, Ti, and Ni), the CO nova models provide the closest and most self-consistent match to both the putative nova grains and the subset of AB grains lacking s-process signatures. CO novae of low- to intermediate-mass naturally reproduce the observed 14N/15N-26Al/27Al trend, the Si isotope compositions of AB grains which dominantly reflect Galactic chemical evolution (GCE), and the mild Si isotope shifts in putative nova grains relative to the GCE trend defined by AB grains. In contrast, ONe and recurrent nova models fail multiple isotopic constraints simultaneously. These results demonstrate that low- to intermediate-mass CO novae (0.6-1.0 Msun) are the most plausible stellar sources of 13C-rich SiC dust lacking s-process signatures (1-2\% of all presolar SiC), and they establish a multielement, model-anchored framework for quantifying nova contributions to the dust reservoir in the interstellar medium.

analysis.one_sentence_en: New high-resolution NanoSIMS multielement isotope measurements of Murchison presolar SiC grains show that low- to intermediate-mass CO novae most consistently explain the 13C-rich, s-process–poor grains, whereas ONe and recurrent nova models fail key isotope constraints.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 新的高分辨率NanoSIMS多元素同位素测量表明，低至中等质量的CO新星最一致地解释富13C且缺乏s过程指纹的陨石前驱SiC晶粒，而ONe和再发新星模型难以同时满足多个同位素约束。
summary_en: problem: Determine which nova types could produce 13C-rich presolar SiC grains—especially those lacking s-process signatures—using multielement isotope evidence beyond earlier limited element sets.

approach: Re-measure C, N, Si, Mg-Al, Ti, and Ni isotopes with NanoSIMS for putative nova and AB SiC grains from Murchison, then compare them to an expanded suite of hydrodynamic CO, ONe, and recurrent nova models spanning white-dwarf mass and pre-enrichment parameters.

key result: Considering C, N, Mg-Al, Si, Ti, and Ni together, CO nova models give the closest self-consistent match (including the 14N/15N–26Al/27Al trend and Si-isotope behavior), while ONe and recurrent nova models fail multiple isotopic constraints; low- to intermediate-mass CO novae (0.6–1.0 Msun) emerge as the most plausible sources for the relevant 13C-rich, s-process–poor grains.
summary_zh: problem: 用更全面的多元素同位素证据辨识哪些新星类型能够产生富13C且缺乏s过程指纹的前太阳SiC晶粒。
approach: 对Murchison样品中疑似新星SiC与AB SiC晶粒开展NanoSIMS多元素同位素再测（C、N、Si、Mg-Al、Ti、Ni），并与覆盖白矮星质量和预富集参数的扩展CO、ONe及再发新星水动力模型进行联合对比。
key result: 将C、N、Mg-Al、Si、Ti与Ni等体系一起考虑时，CO新星模型给出最接近且自洽的匹配（再现14N/15N–26Al/27Al趋势并解释AB主导的GCE相关Si同位素与疑似新星晶粒的轻微偏移），而ONe与再发新星模型无法同时满足多个同位素约束；因此0.6–1.0 Msun的低至中等质量CO新星最可能是该类富13C且无s过程指纹的SiC尘埃来源。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a multielement, NanoSIMS-based isotopic dataset and a model-anchored comparison framework showing that low- to intermediate-mass CO novae best reproduce the joint C–N–Si–Mg-Al–Ti–Ni isotopic signatures of s-process–poor 13C-rich presolar SiC grains.
analysis.contribution_zh: 给出一套基于NanoSIMS多元素同位素的新数据，并建立以模型为锚点的联合对比框架，表明低至中等质量CO新星最能复现实验所观测到的、缺乏s过程指纹的富13C前太阳SiC晶粒在C–N–Si–Mg-Al–Ti–Ni等多同位素体系上的共同特征。
analysis.method_en: High-resolution NanoSIMS imaging-mode multielement isotopic measurements of C, N, Si, Mg-Al, Ti, and Ni for selected putative nova SiC grains and AB SiC grains from the Murchison meteorite, including improved Mg/Al relative sensitivity for SiC to refine inferred 26Al/27Al; then comparison to an expanded suite of 1D hydrodynamic hydrodynamic nova simulations (SHIVA) for CO, ONe, and recurrent novae spanning white-dwarf masses and pre-enrichment parameters.
analysis.method_zh: 采用高分辨率NanoSIMS成像模式对Murchison陨石中疑似新星与AB SiC晶粒开展C、N、Si、Mg-Al、Ti与Ni的多元素同位素测量；通过修订SiC的Mg/Al相对灵敏度以改进26Al/27Al推断；随后将这些观测结果与扩展的1D水动力新星模拟（SHIVA）进行对比，模拟对象包括CO、ONe与再发新星，并覆盖白矮星质量及预富集参数范围。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Murchison meteorite presolar SiC grains: 4 putative nova grains and 79 AB SiC grains; no external astronomical region is applicable.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: Murchison陨石中的前太阳SiC晶粒：4颗疑似新星SiC晶粒和79颗AB SiC晶粒；不涉及特定天区观测。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Relevance is tangential: this work is astro-cosmochemical (presolar grain nucleosynthesis provenance) rather than a direct geophysical measurement, but it uses isotopic constraints on astrophysical explosions.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 相关性较弱：该研究属于天体化学/宇宙尘埃成因溯源，而非直接的地球物理观测或地球过程；但它通过同位素约束为恒星爆发的物质来源提供证据。

paper.title: Reassessment of Ionospheric Responses to GRB~221009A: Disentangling Instrumental, Illumination and Geophysical Effects
paper.abstract: Gamma-ray bursts (GRBs) have long been proposed to perturb Earth's ionosphere, with occasional reports of disruptions in ultra- and extremely-low-frequency radio signals. The exceptionally bright GRB~221009A was recently claimed to induce multi-altitude ionospheric responses, including perturbations in satellite electric fields, regional total electron content (TEC), and the equatorial electrojet (EEJ). These claims have renewed interest in the potential near-Earth impacts of astrophysical transients. Here we perform an independent reassessment using expanded datasets spanning multiple altitudes. We find no coherent, burst-like TEC enhancement, show that the reported electric-field anomalies recur under specific illumination conditions each orbit, and demonstrate that the EEJ fluctuations preceded the burst and coincide with solar-wind variability. Together, these results indicate that the reported GRB-induced ionospheric responses are fully attributable to other natural geophysical processes and instrumental artefacts, thereby resolving a high-profile controversy and clarifying the true limits of GRBs'ionospheric effects.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Using expanded multi-altitude GNSS, satellite electric-field, and equatorial electrojet analyses, the authors find no coherent GRB 221009A ionospheric signature and attribute reported anomalies to solar-wind variability and instrumental/illumination effects.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 通过扩展的多高度GNSS、卫星电场与赤道电喷流(EJ)联合分析，作者未发现GRB 221009A导致的协同电离层信号，并将既报道异常归因于太阳风驱动及仪器/照明几何效应。
summary_en: problem: Whether the extremely bright GRB 221009A caused measurable, burst-like perturbations in Earth’s ionosphere (TEC, satellite electric fields, and EEJ).

approach: Reassess the claims using expanded GNSS-TEC, full-year CSES electric-field data with illumination/geometry checks, and magnetometer-derived EEJ proxies alongside solar-wind/geomagnetic conditions.

key result: No burst-like TEC enhancement is found; reported electric-field anomalies recur with illumination geometry each orbit; and EEJ fluctuations occur before the burst and match solar-wind variability—indicating GRB-related effects are not supported.
summary_zh: problem: GRB 221009A是否在电离层中产生可测的突发型扰动（TEC、卫星电场与赤道电喷流EEJ）。
approach: 利用扩展的GNSS TEC数据、CSES电场的全年观测并结合照明/轨道几何分析，以及地面磁强计推得的EEJ代理，同时对照太阳风与地磁条件重新评估。
key result: 未发现与GRB时间对应的突发型TEC增强；电场异常呈现随每轨照明几何重复的特征；EEJ波动先于爆发现并与太阳风变化一致，表明无法支持GRB引起的电离层效应。
analysis.contribution_en: The paper resolves a controversy by demonstrating, with a multi-instrument and illumination-aware reassessment, that previously claimed GRB 221009A ionospheric signatures are explainable by natural space-weather variability and instrument/illumination artefacts.
analysis.contribution_zh: 该论文通过多仪器联合再评估并纳入照明几何影响，表明先前关于GRB 221009A的电离层效应说法可由自然空间天气变化与仪器/照明伪影解释，从而澄清了相关争议。
analysis.method_en: GNSS-derived global TEC from thousands of receivers with elevation and temporal high-pass filtering; CSES satellite electric-field data processed with large-scale-field removal and inspected for orbit-to-orbit recurrence tied to solar zenith angle/illumination transitions; and ground magnetometer-based EEJ proxies normalized to quiet-time distributions, compared against concurrent solar-wind speed and IMF variability.
analysis.method_zh: 对成千接收机的GNSS反演全球TEC进行仰角筛选与时间高通滤波；对CSES卫星电场进行大尺度场分量去除，并检查其是否随轨道重复、与太阳天顶角/照明边界转换相关；同时用地面磁强计构建EEJ代理并以静稳时间分布归一，结合太阳风速度与IMF变动进行对照。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Global GNSS TEC observations (3,374 receivers, excluding higher latitudes; elevation >30°) plus CSES electric-field measurements at 507 km sun-synchronous orbit and ground magnetometers at Tatuoca (magnetic equator region) and San Juan (near/beyond EEJ belt), focusing on GRB 221009A around 9 Oct 2022; exact region details beyond the global coverage are not the main emphasis.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 全球GNSS TEC观测（3,374个接收机，剔除高纬；仰角>30°）以及CSES 507 km近太阳同步轨道电场数据，并使用Tatuoca（接近磁赤道）与San Juan（赤道电喷流带附近/外侧）的地面磁强计；重点围绕2022年10月9日GRB 221009A时段（区域细节不作为主要区分点）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: It directly addresses claimed astrophysical-transient impacts on near-Earth ionospheric observables (TEC, EEJ, and satellite electric fields), but finds the effects are not GRB-driven; relevance is high for controversy resolution and for identifying non-GRB causes.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 它直接检验了由天文瞬变事件引发的近地电离层效应主张（TEC、EEJ与卫星电场），但结论认为并非由GRB触发；因此对澄清争议与识别非GRB成因具有较高相关性。

paper.title: The Astro2Geo Project I. Radio astrometric offsets correlated with Gamma-ray brightness
paper.abstract: Precision geodesy relies on the stability of the International Celestial Reference Frame (ICRF), yet its reference sources, Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN), exhibit changes in source structure that can manifest as apparent shifts in their astrometric positions. The high-precision radio measurements used to maintain the ICRF therefore provide a means to investigate the astrophysical mechanisms driving these changes. In particular, the observed astrometric variability offers a unique opportunity to link positional shifts in AGN to high-energy astrophysical processes. We investigated the relationship between the astrometric positions of ICRF AGN and their Gamma-ray emission. We measured the positional offsets of radio cores relative to the ICRF3 at both S/X and K bands and compared them to Fermi-LAT Gamma-ray fluxes within +/-30 days. Out of 92 radio sources, we identified 57 that had enough overlapping data. We find a high incidence of statistically significant (p<0.05) power-law correlations, with ~90% of sources exhibiting this behaviour. The nature of this correlation is complex: we observe both positive and negative correlations, and the sign of the correlation can differ between the two frequency bands for the same source. To explain the correlations, we tested variable Gamma-ray emission locations, changes in nuclear opacity, and variations in jet position angle. Our analysis reveals no single explanation and suggests a complex interplay of multiple physical mechanisms. A search for time lags between the radio position offsets and Gamma-ray fluxes revealed tentative - and highly caveated - evidence for a time-delay in only five sources. A statistical comparison with the OCARS catalogue shows that, although our sample is biased towards optically brighter sources with better-constrained astrometric solutions, it remains representative of the broader AGN population in terms of redshift.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The Astro2Geo project correlates VLBI radio core position offsets from ICRF3 with nearly contemporaneous Fermi-LAT gamma-ray brightness for 57 AGN and finds widespread, frequency-dependent power-law correlations likely driven by multiple physical mechanisms.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: Astro2Geo 将射电核心相对ICRF3的位置偏移与费米LAT近时段伽马射线亮度关联，针对57个AGN发现高比例且与频段相关的幂律相关，可能由多种物理机制共同作用。
summary_en: problem: Determine whether intrinsic astrometric offsets of ICRF AGN are linked to high-energy (gamma-ray) activity.

approach: Compute VLBI core position offsets relative to ICRF3 at S/X and K bands and regress them against Fermi-LAT fluxes within ±30 days, including EM-based handling of upper limits and a lag search via zDCF.

key result: Most sources show statistically significant power-law correlations (~90% of 57), with correlation signs differing by band for the same AGN; no single tested physical scenario explains all cases, and only five sources show tentative (highly caveated) evidence for time delays.
summary_zh: problem: 判断ICRF AGN 的本征天体测量偏移是否与高能伽马射线活动有关。
approach: 计算相对ICRF3的S/X与K波段VLBI核心位置偏移，并与±30天内的费米LAT通量做回归；对上限采用EM处理，并用zDCF搜索潜在时间滞后。
key result: 在57个样本中约90%呈显著幂律相关，且同一源的相关正负可在两个频段间发生改变；多种物理解释无法给出统一答案，仅5个源出现时间滞后的初步（高度谨慎）证据。
analysis.contribution_en: It provides a systematic, multi-frequency statistical connection between geodetic VLBI astrometric offsets (ICRF-based) and gamma-ray brightness for a sizeable AGN sample, testing several physical interpretations and performing a cautious lag analysis.
analysis.contribution_zh: 它基于较大规模AGN样本，系统建立了ICRF体系下的VLBI天体测量偏移与伽马射线亮度之间的多频段统计联系，并检验多种物理解释及做了谨慎的时间滞后分析。
analysis.method_en: Geodetic/astrometric VLBI processing (VieVS, IVS/Geo astrometry analysis) to estimate session-wise RA/Dec corrections for selected ICRF3-SX and K-band sources, convert to angular offsets, then correlate those offsets with Fermi-LAT 30-day cadence fluxes using orthogonal distance regression with an EM treatment for left-censored upper limits; assess time lags using zDCF with Monte Carlo simulations.
analysis.method_zh: 利用地理/天体测量VLBI流程（VieVS，IVS体系分析）对选定源估计相对ICRF3的分时段RA/Dec修正，得到角位置偏移；再将其与费米LAT 30天步长的通量（对左删失上限用EM并结合正交距离回归）做回归关联；最后用zDCF结合蒙特卡洛模拟评估时间滞后。
analysis.data_or_region_en: 92 candidate ICRF AGN were considered; 57 had sufficient overlapping Fermi-LAT coverage for ±30-day comparisons. VLBI S/X offsets used ICRF3-SX at 8.4 GHz plus 2.3 GHz, spanning 24-h IVS sessions from 1980–2024; K-band offsets come from Astro2Geo 24 GHz sessions including VLBA 2002–2008 pilot and ongoing Astro2Geo K-band campaigns (extensions with additional stations since ~2022).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 考虑了92个候选ICRF AGN，但只有57个与费米LAT在±30天窗口内具有足够重叠数据用于比较。VLBI的S/X偏移基于ICRF3-SX相关参考（8.4 GHz）并结合2.3 GHz，使用1980–2024年间的IVS 24小时会话；K波段偏移来自Astro2Geo在24 GHz的会话，包括2002–2008年的VLBA试点与之后持续进行的Astro2Geo K波段观测（约2022年后加入更多台站）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is astrophysical rather than geophysical: it uses VLBI reference-frame astrometry to study AGN physics, indirectly relevant to precision geodesy via understanding how ICRF source structure changes create apparent position offsets.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这主要是天体物理而非地球物理：它利用VLBI参考架构的天体测量数据研究AGN物理过程，但也通过揭示ICRF源结构变化如何造成表观位置偏移，间接服务于高精度测地需求。

paper.title: Chromospheric resonator model for sunspot revealed by multi-height observation of umbral wave
paper.abstract: Sunspots are transient, magnetically intense features that host oscillations linked to magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) waves. These waves may contribute to plasma heating and drive mass flows in the solar wind. Beyond their energetic role, they serve as diagnostic tools for probing sunspot structure. In this study, we investigated chromospheric wave propagation in a sunspot using high-resolution, multi-wavelength observations from the Goode Solar Telescope at Big Bear Solar Observatory. Spectral analysis shows that the intensity at H$α$ line core and its wings exhibited oscillatory signal at about 3 min. We performed a cross-wavelet analysis to examine the phase relationship between the wing-integrated and line-core intensity oscillations of the H$α$ line and the centroid-derived H$α$ Doppler velocity. We also analyze the phase relationships between intensity pairs from different passband combinations of the H$α$ line. The results indicate the presence of slow magnetoacoustic modes manifesting standing waves along with upward propagating waves. The observed phase patterns suggest that umbral waves are confined within a non-ideal acoustic resonator, providing measurable wave properties that could serve as input for sunspot seismology and refine models of sunspot atmospheric structure.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Using multi-height Hα observations of a sunspot umbra from GST/BBSO, the authors analyze ~3-minute phase relations to infer slow magnetoacoustic waves consistent with a non-ideal acoustic resonator.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 作者利用BBSO/GST对太阳斑暗区的多高度Hα观测，分析约3分钟振荡的相位关系，推断慢磁声学波并表明存在非理想声学共振腔。
summary_en: problem: Determine what wave-trapping mechanism produces the dominant ~3-minute umbral oscillations in a sunspot chromosphere.

approach: Use GST/VIS Hα multi-passband time series (core, wings) plus center-of-mass Hα Doppler velocity, then apply wavelet and cross-wavelet/phase-coherence analyses to compare intensity and velocity phase lags across heights.
key result: The measured phase patterns indicate slow magnetoacoustic modes appearing as both standing and upward-propagating waves, with umbral waves confined in a non-ideal acoustic resonator.
summary_zh: problem: 弄清太阳斑暗区铬层中占主导的约3分钟振荡由何种波动俘获/共振机制产生。
approach: 采用GST/VIS的Hα多通道（线心与翼）强度时间序列及Hα质心法多普勒速度，结合小波与交叉小波/相干相位分析比较不同高度间强度与速度的相位滞后。
key result: 观测到的相位特征表明存在慢磁声学模态，既表现为驻波也含向上传播分量，且暗区波动被限制在非理想声学共振腔中。
analysis.contribution_en: The paper provides observational evidence, via multi-passband Hα intensity–Doppler phase analysis, that the ~3-minute umbral oscillations are governed by slow magnetoacoustic standing/upward components confined by a non-ideal acoustic resonator, supplying measurable wave properties for sunspot seismology.
analysis.contribution_zh: 通过多通道Hα强度-多普勒速度的相位耦合分析，论文给出了观测证据：约3分钟暗区振荡由受限于非理想声学共振腔的慢磁声学驻波与向上传播分量共同主导，并可为太阳斑地震学提供可测波动参数。
analysis.method_en: High-resolution GST/VIS scanning spectroscopy of Hα (line core and multiple wing offsets) over a sunspot umbra, speckle reconstruction, COM centroid Doppler velocity retrieval, then wavelet analysis for ~3-minute power and cross-wavelet coherence/phase-difference mapping between passbands’ integrated wing intensity and Doppler velocity (including phase lag selection based on 95% significance and coherence thresholds).
analysis.method_zh: 对太阳斑暗区进行GST/VIS高分辨率Hα扫描光谱观测（线心及多个谱翼偏置），进行散斑重建，采用质心（COM）法从Hα谱线轮廓反演多普勒速度；再用小波分析识别~3分钟振荡功率，并通过交叉小波相干与相位差分析生成相位图，比较谱翼积分强度与Hα多普勒速度（并结合95%显著性与相干阈值筛选相位）。
analysis.data_or_region_en: NOAA AR 12384 sunspot umbra observed at Big Bear Solar Observatory/GST using VIS in Hα on July 14, 2015 (17:36–18:06 UT), with ~19 s chromospheric cadence and speckle reconstruction; study region: GST field covering the umbra within the selected ~70″ VIS FOV.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 观测对象为Big Bear Solar Observatory/GST的VIS在Hα波段对NOAA AR 12384太阳斑暗区的观测：2015-07-14（17:36–18:06 UT），铬层观测约19 s时间分辨率并进行散斑重建；研究区域为GST视场内被选定的暗区（VIS最大约70″圆形视场内）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Relevance is tangential: this is solar physics (sunspot seismology) rather than terrestrial geophysics, but it addresses wave-resonator diagnostics through multi-height oscillation phase measurements.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 相关性较弱：该研究属于太阳物理（太阳斑地震学），而非地球物理；但其通过多高度振荡相位测量来诊断波动共振腔机制，方法学上具有一定启发。
